name: write-file
description: Write or append content to a file atomically, creating parent directories, replacing cat+heredoc patterns.

parameters.name: filepath
parameters.description: Path to the file to write or append to

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Content lines as arguments; reads from stdin if omitted

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces cat+heredoc file creation and cat >> append patterns with a single step, saving 1 step per file write.
